samples.xml_description: Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier. Clock. Active-low reset. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Product. 4 Extend input signals. Loop index. mul_a_ext[i] = (mul_a[i]) ? mul_a[i] : 1'b0; mul_b_ext[i] = (mul_b[i]) ? mul_b[i] : 1'b0; Generate partial products. Loop index. Loop index. for (i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin if (mul_b_ext[i] == 1'b1) begin partial_product[i] = mul_a_ext << i; end else begin partial_product[i] = 'd0; end end Registers to store intermediate values. Loop index. for (i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin reg sum_reg = 0; reg carry_reg = 0; end Sequential logic for add operations. Loop index. for (i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin if (rst_n == 1'b0) begin sum_reg[i] = 'd0; carry_reg[i] = 'd0; end else begin {carry_reg[i], sum_reg[i]} = partial_product[i] + sum_reg[i-1]; end end Final product calculation. for (i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin if (rst_n == 1'b0) begin mul_out = 'd0; end else begin mul_out = mul_out + sum_reg[i]; end end
